word: G1295 - διασώζω - diasṓzō - dee-as-odze'-o - Bring safe

sections.paragraph:
- Original: διασώζω

- Transliteration: Diasozo

- Phonetic: dee-as-odze'-o

- Definition:

1. to preserve through danger, to bring safely through

a. to save, i.e. cure one who is sick, bring him through

2. to save, keep from perishing

3. to save out of danger, rescue

- Origin: from G1223 and G4982

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1223 and G4982; to save thoroughly that is (by implication or analogy) to cure preserve rescue etc.: - bring safe escape (safe) heal make perfectly whole save.
